backstory.original: Viconia DeVir is a devout cleric of Shar, the goddess of darkness and loss. Viconia was cast out of Menzoberranzan and house DeVir after refusing to sacrifice a child to the spider goddess Lolth. Don't mistake her for a champion of good, however. Viconia has lived a dangerous and difficult life, and she joins the Champions at the behest of two old 'friends', Baeloth & Minsc. She may not approve of how the Champions work, but she's here and ready to assist, so long as the quest, and the payout pleases her.
backstory.display: 维康妮亚·德维尔是信奉黑暗与失去之女神--莎尔的虔诚牧师。因为拒绝向蜘蛛女神罗丝献祭一名孩童，维康妮亚被逐出魔索布莱城和德维尔家族。但是，千万不要因此而认为她就是一名善良的勇士。维康妮亚一直过着危险而艰难的生活，随后在两位老“朋友”--贝洛斯和明斯克--的要求下加入了勇士们。她也许并不认同勇士们的行事方式，但只要大家的目的一致，且结果能让她满意，她还是愿意提供协助。

description.original: Viconia slings a stone at a random enemy.
description.display: 维康妮亚向一名随机敌人投掷石块。

longDescription.original: Viconia slings a stone at a random enemy.
longDescription.display: 维康妮亚向一名随机敌人投掷石块。

description.original: Viconia summons darkness that damages all enemies and increases the odds of triggering Animate Dead.
description.display: 维康妮亚召唤黑暗，伤害所有敌人并提高触发操纵死尸的几率。

longDescription.original: Viconia summons a cloying miasma of cold and greasy darkness that damages all enemies and increases the odds of any enemies killed by it triggering Animate Dead by 50%.
longDescription.display: 维康尼亚召唤一股寒冷、油腻而黑暗的恐怖瘴气。它会伤害所有的敌人，在它杀死任何敌人后，增加触发操纵死尸的几率 50%。

description.original: Viconia reanmiates fallen enemies to attack their former companions
description.display: 维康妮亚复活死去的敌人，并指挥它们攻击原来的同伙

description.original: Viconia heals Champions who have been gravely injured
description.display: 维康妮亚治疗受到严重创伤的勇士

conditions.desc: Increase the damage of Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions and Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champions by $(amount)%.
Increase the damage of Evil Champions and Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champions by $(amount)%.
使中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士和属于“博德之门的英雄们”的勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。
使邪恶勇士和属于“博德之门的英雄们”的勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

description.desc: Heals allies that are under $(limit)% health for $(amount) health per second for $(heal_over_time_ticks) seconds.
每秒为生命值低于 $(limit)% 的盟友治疗 $(amount) 点生命值，持续 $(heal_over_time_ticks) 秒。

tipText.original: Viconia heals Champions that have been gravely injured.
tipText.display: 维康妮亚会治疗受到严重创伤的勇士。

description.desc: When a non-boss enemy is killed there is a $(amount)% chance that Viconia will seize control of its lifeless body and turn it against its former allies for $(reanimation_duration) seconds, stopping their movement. While it is re-animated, it deals $(amount___2)% of your BUD to nearby enemies each second. There can be up to $(max_reanimated) re-animated enemies at a time.
每当有非首领敌人被击杀时，有 $(amount)% 几率维康妮亚会夺取其失去生命的躯体的控制权，并用它来拖延原来的同伙，阻止他们移动，持续 $(reanimation_duration) 秒。被复活后，它每秒会对周围敌人造成等同于你基础杀招伤害 $(amount___2)% 的伤害。一次最多可以存在 $(max_reanimated) 个复活的敌人。

tipText.original: Viconia has a chance to animate dead enemies and turn them against their friends.
tipText.display: 维康妮亚有几率复活死去的敌人，指挥它们来对付曾经的友军。

description.desc: Increase the effect of Cleric of Shar by $(amount)% for each column away from the back-most column she is, stacking multiplicatively.
她与最后列的距离每增加一列，莎尔的牧师的效果提高 $(amount)%（乘算）。

specializationDescription.original: Viconia prefers to support from the front.
specializationDescription.display: 维康妮亚喜欢从前方提供支援。

description.desc: Cleric of Shar now affects Neutral (Good/Evil axis) champions instead of Evil ones. Heroes of Baldur's Gate are still covered under this new plan.
莎尔的牧师现在会影响中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士而非邪恶勇士。针对“博德之门的英雄们”的效果不变。

specializationDescription.original: Viconia prefers the presence of Neutral Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 维康妮亚喜欢阵型中有中立勇士。

description.desc: Increase the chance for Animate Dead to trigger by $(amount)%.
使操纵死尸的触发几率提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Viconia focuses on reanimating the dead.
specializationDescription.display: 维康妮亚专注于复活亡灵。

description.desc: Whenever a non-boss, non-static, non-undead enemy spawns there is a $(amount)% chance that it spawns as an undead version of itself while also retaining its original tags.
每当一个非首领、非静态、非亡灵的敌人刷新时，都有 $(amount)% 的几率以自身的亡灵版本刷新，同时保留其原始标签。

conditions.desc: Increase the damage of Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions and Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champions by $(amount)%.
Increase the damage of Evil Champions and Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champions by $(amount)%.
使中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士和属于“博德之门的英雄们”的勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。
使邪恶勇士和属于“博德之门的英雄们”的勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

description.original: Sacrifice is the edict of Shar.
description.display: 牺牲是莎尔的敕令。

description.original: I have to do everything myself.
description.display: 什么都得我自己来干。

description.original: May Shar pass you over...and give her power to me.
description.display: 希望莎尔把你带走......然后赐予我她的力量。

description.original: Everything may end, by Shar's blessing, but you end first.
description.display: 万物皆有终结，但有了莎尔的祝福，你将成为第一个被终结者。

description.original: I suppose we can call each other...acquaintances.
description.display: 我觉得我们应该算得上是......熟人。

effects.description: Increases the chance of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) triggering by $(amount)%

description.original: I have more use for you than the god of the dead does.
description.display: 相比起死亡之神，我拿你们有更多的用处。

description.original: Oh, give it here, I'll show you how it's done.
description.display: 哦，交给我吧，我来展示该怎么做。

description.original: Zombies have their uses.
description.display: 僵尸自有其用途。

description.original: Hordes of undead? I don't see a problem.
description.display: 成群结队的亡灵？我不认为这是个问题。

description.original: Take comfort in the security of Shar's inevitability.
description.display: 在莎尔注定的命运中获得安慰。

description.original: Have you succeeded? Have your brought the Weapon?
description.display: 你成功了吗？你带来武器了吗？

description.original: My vitality is yet another thing lost in the pursuit of the Lady of Loss' goals.
description.display: 我的生命力是为了追求失去之女的目标而失去的又一样东西。

effects.description: Viconia also counts as Undead
Increases the damage of Viconia's Animate Dead ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Stand, fool. I do not permit you to die. Yet.
description.display: 站起来，蠢货，我不准你死。还没到时候。

description.original: It will have to do.
description.display: 只能先将就用了。

description.original: An unused weapon has yet to fulfill its promise.
description.display: 一件用旧的武器还是能满足它存在的目的。

description.original: The only one who'll guard my back is me, and I prefer it that way.
description.display: 唯一能护住我背后的只有我自己，我也喜欢这样。

description.original: Avert your eyes, swine, or I'll acquaint you with my weapon.
description.display: 别看了，卑鄙的家伙，否则就尝尝我的武器吧。

description.original: I'm not fool enough to dismiss Lolth...but she's not fool enough to dismiss Shar.
description.display: 我不会蠢到拒绝罗丝......但她也不会蠢到拒绝莎尔。

description.original: Everything becomes nothing. Why not seize what you can in the meantime?
description.display: 一切都化为虚无。这个时候，为什么不抓住你能抓住的一切呢？

description.original: Be glad I do not still follow Lolth; if I did, your death would be much slower.
description.display: 你应该高兴我没有继续信仰罗丝；否则的话，你的死亡会缓慢得多。

description.original: There is no power greater than the void of Shar. You'll see.
description.display: 没有比莎尔的虚空更强大的力量了。你待会就会知道了。

description.original: You don't need to know my past. Only that Shar has lifted me from it.
description.display: 你不需要知道我的过去。总之，是莎尔把我从过去带到了现在。

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%

description.original: I wear my allegiance with pride. I'd rather know you were against me from the start.
description.display: 我很自豪地宣誓效忠。我宁愿你从一开始就是我的敌人。

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%

description.original: Sometimes life has its little rewards.
description.display: 有时候生命其本身就是一种回报。

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%

description.original: I think you'll find my eyes are up here. Below the crystal full of evocation magic.
description.display: 我想你应该能看到我的眼睛就在这上面。就在充满召唤魔法的水晶下面。

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%

description.original: I have all manner of potions and poisons at my disposal.
description.display: 我有各式各样的药剂和毒药可供使用。

description.original: I know who I am--but you don't need to know I was here.
description.display: 我知道我是谁--但你不需要知道我在这里。

description.original: A sip of this, and you could crush anyone who sought to hold you down.
description.display: 喝上一小口，你就能干掉所有想把你按住的人。

description.original: I will say this for spiders: they always come right back. I admire that.
description.display: 这句话是送给蜘蛛的：它们总是能马上就回来。我很钦佩这一点。

description.original: I don't need to be close to you to know I want to destroy you.
description.display: 我不需要跟你很亲近就能知道我要毁了你。

description.original: It does make a nice 'thwack' when it hits.
description.display: 打中东西的时候“啪”的一声很好听。

description.original: This stone has your name on it, I believe.
description.display: 我觉得，这块石头上有你的名字。

description.original: I'll burn a hole right through you.
description.display: 我要在你身上烧穿一个洞。

description.original: I prefer privacy as I go about my business.
description.display: 我做事的时候喜欢更私密一点。

description.original: You don't need to look at me.
description.display: 你不需要看我。

description.original: Purple and black are very much my colors.
description.display: 紫色和黑色是最适合我的颜色。

description.original: Wrapped in Shar's purpose, I feel comfort and certainty.
description.display: 有了莎尔的指引，我感到舒适和自信。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Elf Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Viconia DeVir is a devout cleric of Shar, the goddess of darkness and loss. Viconia was cast out of Menzoberranzan and house DeVir after refusing to sacrifice a child to the spider goddess Lolth. Don't mistake her for a champion of good, however. Viconia has lived a dangerous and difficult life, and she joins the Champions at the behest of two old 'friends', Baeloth & Minsc. She may not approve of how the Champions work, but she's here and ready to assist, so long as the quest, and the payout pleases her.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Viconia is a Support/Healing Champion who raises the dead enemies to aid the Champions

event_upgrades.name: Cure Medium Wounds
event_upgrades.description: Viconia heals Champions who have been gravely injured

event_upgrades.name: Animate Dead
event_upgrades.description: Viconia reanmiates fallen enemies to attack their former companions

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%

display.name: 爆弹圆环
display.description: 我想你应该能看到我的眼睛就在这上面。就在充满召唤魔法的水晶下面。

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)伤害增加 $(amount)%。

original.name: Minor Tincture
original.description: I have all manner of potions and poisons at my disposal.

display.name: 小药瓶
display.description: 我有各式各样的药剂和毒药可供使用。

original.name: Potion of Invisibility
original.description: I know who I am--but you don't need to know I was here.

display.name: 隐形药剂
display.description: 我知道我是谁--但你不需要知道我在这里。

original.name: Potion of Strength
original.description: A sip of this, and you could crush anyone who sought to hold you down.

display.name: 力量药剂
display.description: 喝上一小口，你就能干掉所有想把你按住的人。

original.name: Potion of Superior Healing
original.description: I will say this for spiders: they always come right back. I admire that.

display.name: 卓越治疗药剂
display.description: 这句话是送给蜘蛛的：它们总是能马上就回来。我很钦佩这一点。

original.name: Tattered Sling
original.description: I don't need to be close to you to know I want to destroy you.

display.name: 破烂投石器
display.description: 我不需要跟你很亲近就能知道我要毁了你。

original.name: Repaired Flinger
original.description: It does make a nice 'thwack' when it hits.

display.name: 修好的投石器
display.description: 打中东西的时候“啪”的一声很好听。

original.name: Skillful Sling
original.description: This stone has your name on it, I believe.

display.name: 熟练投石器
display.description: 我觉得，这块石头上有你的名字。

original.name: Missiles of the Inferno
original.description: I'll burn a hole right through you.

display.name: 地狱火飞弹
display.description: 我要在你身上烧穿一个洞。

original.name: Encompassing Cloak
original.description: I prefer privacy as I go about my business.

display.name: 包围斗篷
display.description: 我做事的时候喜欢更私密一点。

original.name: Shadowy Hood
original.description: You don't need to look at me.

display.name: 幽暗斗篷
display.description: 你不需要看我。

original.name: Cloak of the Dark Lady
original.description: Purple and black are very much my colors.

display.name: 黑暗女士斗篷
display.description: 紫色和黑色是最适合我的颜色。

original.name: Mantle of Eternal Night
original.description: Wrapped in Shar's purpose, I feel comfort and certainty.

display.name: 永恒之夜披风
display.description: 有了莎尔的指引，我感到舒适和自信。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Elf Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位精灵勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有感知大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位智力大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%
使所有中立阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
